title: UK/Viet Nam: Agreement on Cooperation and Mutual Administrative Assistance in Customs Matters [CS Viet Nam No.1/2026]
body: "Published title: Agreement between the Government of the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland and the Government of the Socialist Republic of Viet Nam on Cooperation and Mutual Administrative Assistance in Customs Matters. "

taxons.title: Customs declarations, duties and tariffs (import and export)
